## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Account Strategist role at GrowthX with potential candidate Soma Aliakbari.](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content marketing services, generating blog content for clients using a proprietary platform](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [The Account Strategist role would oversee 2-3 pods (8-10 clients total), focusing on strategic delivery and client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Soma has experience in customer-facing roles and AI/automation, but limited marketing background](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest, with some areas for further exploration identified](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Offering

  - [Services org using AI workflows to produce content at scale for clients](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Clients include SaaS companies like Ramp, Abnormal Security, Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Differentiator: Approaching SaaS platform from services side, leveraging AI for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [30-60 mins manual editing per article currently; working to improve automation](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Some clients want high volume (50 articles/month), others more hands-on (3/week)](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

### Account Strategist Role Details

  - [Oversee 2-3 pods (8-10 clients total)](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Focus on strategic delivery, building "railroad tracks" for pod execution](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Work with managing editors and content managers](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Facilitate feedback loops with product team](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Think about scaling efficiencies within the product](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

### ROI Measurement and Analytics

  - [Track clicks, impressions, calls booked, signups](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Use CTAs on pages to measure funnel performance](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Not yet programmatic, but working towards better quantification](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Soma emphasized importance of tying efforts to business impact](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

### Soma's Background and Experience

  - [Art/design education, UX/UI design background](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Moved into conversation design and AI/automation for customer service](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Currently in CSM role managing large, multi-million dollar accounts](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Strong in customer-facing roles, working with product teams, and driving value](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

### Potential Fit and Areas for Growth

  - [Soma expressed interest but noted knowledge gap in marketing specifics](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Andi suggested marketing knowledge less crucial than process orientation and high-level thinking](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Both acknowledged evolving nature of AI in marketing/search](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Soma to consider role further and reach out with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
  - [GrowthX team to evaluate Soma's fit for the position](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
  - [Potential follow-up to dive deeper into GrowthX's workflows and automation](https://fathom.video/share/_-D_fn-sQgXHc4yxf1-Zow5VN_yciavB?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
